keyMappings:
# Insert your preferred key mappings here

map d removeTab
map u restoreTab
map <c-H> previousTab
map <c-L> nextTab
map <c-t> Vomnibar.activateInNewTab

map <Space>g Vomnibar.activate
map <Space>f Vomnibar.activateTabSelection
map <Space>p Vomnibar.activateBookmarks

map J scrollPageDown
map K scrollPageUp
